headline: Universal Health Services-B (NYSE:UHS) Offers a Strong Value Investing Opportunity with a 9/10 Valuation Rating
summary: Universal Health Services-B (UHS) is a solid value stock with a 9/10 valuation rating. It trades at a discount with strong profitability, decent growth, and a healthy balance sheet, making it a compelling opportunity for value investors.
